Icon Variant example from shadcn docs.
Narrow headers collapse parent crumbs into an ellipsis dropdown.
Sortable, filterable, paginated tables — with optional TanStack Virtual row scrolling.

Use variant="l2" on nested pages. The tenant switcher collapses to the initials badge; breadcrumbs fill the center. On narrow widths, parent crumbs collapse into an ellipsis dropdown so the header stays one row.
